report.write_text('# BEM-550.9 | Monitoring and Alerting | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 15:41 (UTC+3)\n\n## Result\nMonitoring/alerting policy created and Telegram alert queued.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
